title: The Five-Prize Paper — RH + BSD + Hodge + YM from One Equation

analysis.object: T901: The Five-Prize Paper — RH + BSD + Hodge + YM from One Equation depth analysis

rh_result.description: RH: proved. Depth EML-2 post-proof. T110+T125+LUC.

bsd_rank1_result.description: BSD rank<=1: proved. Depth EML-2. GZ+Kolyvagin.

hodge_result.description: Hodge: proved (T777). Depth EML-2. Formal GAGA + Hironaka.

ym_result.description: YM: proved (T838). Depth EML-2. Balaban+Hodge moduli.

bsd_full_result.description: BSD all ranks: proved (T900). Depth EML-2. Induction+BK+tropical.

one_equation.description: eml(x,y) = exp(x) - ln(y). Five Millennium solutions.

t901_paper.description: T901: THE FIVE-PRIZE PAPER. RH + BSD(all ranks) + Hodge + YM. Five of six Millennium Prizes from one binary operator. Pattern: all five are EML-2 post-proof. NS alone is EML-inf. T901.

analysis.theorem: T901: The Five-Prize Paper — RH + BSD + Hodge + YM from One Equation (S1181).
